title: CareerForge Locale Pack
description: A region's job-application conventions, DECOUPLED from UI language (REQ-7009, ADR-0007). A Spanish speaker applying in Germany uses UI language=es + locale pack=de. Packs are data: adding a region adds a file here, no core change. A missing pack falls back to locale-packs/default.json (ARCH-0005).

documentTerm.description: What the CV is called locally (CV, Résumé, Lebenslauf, Rirekisho, Currículo)

pageSize.description: Paper size for the compiled PDF

photo.description: Photo inclusion norm. 'forbidden' = omit (anti-discrimination markets); 'required' = include per spec.

photoSpec.description: If photo expected/required, any size/placement spec (e.g. 'passport-style, top-right, 4.5x6cm')

includedPersonalFields.description: Personal fields conventionally INCLUDED in this market

discouragedPersonalFields.description: Personal fields conventionally OMITTED (often for anti-discrimination reasons)

nameOrder.description: Display order of given vs family name

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code commonly used for salary in this market (informational)

legalClauses.description: Standard legal/consent clauses, e.g. 'gdpr-consent' for an EU data-processing consent line

documentSystem.description: Optional: special multi-document conventions, e.g. Japan's rirekisho + shokumukeirekisho
